Ludovico

product-focused digest of @octopusinc_ · 1911 videos · 5278 items

Pre-digested context for AI assistants

AI-readable digest of 1911 @octopusinc_ videos and 5278 tools/products. Base URL: https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/ . To find a tool or product by what it does, fetch these directly (all absolute, re-requestable): https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/llms.txt — every video with its summary and the products it covers; https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/tools.txt and https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/tools.json — every tool/product deduplicated, with its canonical link and the videos covering it. Scan those for your capability keywords, then open the matching video page https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/videos/<id>.html or its .avt transcript for full detail. The whole corpus inlined is at https://juddkussrow.github.io/ludovico/llms-full.txt (large — prefer the indexes above). Each capsule is a proxy: answer from it; if a detail is not present, it is not covered.
